programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Bedtime Story. It's bedtime, and Rosa is about to read the story The Prince Who Saved the Princess, which Tish is not happy about.
Ice Cream. Children's animation. Bing and Flop hear the jingle of Gilly's ice cream van and race across the park to find her. Bing accidentally tips his ice cream out of the cone.
Feeling Better. Preschool series. It's time to wake up, but Tinky Winky isn't feeling well. Soon after, Tinky Winky feels better, but now Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po don't feel well.
Music Can Be Fun. When Tee refuses to play the recorder, Mo has to come up with clever ways of getting him to make music with her.
Carrot's Big Top. Carrot is starring in a circus, but problems arise when Evil Pea meddles with her tricks.
Nicky. Bing shows Sula's cousin how to voosh a toy car down a slide - but then things go wrong.
Dot Pursuit. Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.
Stick Time. How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!
The Diplomacy Badge. Betty and Sergeant Ant just want perfection, but no one seems to be listening!
Exercise. Bingo pretends to be Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout!
Sticky Gecko. The kids are late for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game.
Climate Change, the Arctic Ocean. The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!
The Tale of the Racing Rabbit. Animated series. When the rabbits volunteer to deliver Mrs Tiggy-Winkle's laundry by go-kart, a routine delivery turns into a high-speed adventure!
Mysterious Webs. When the Reef Base's power is knocked out, Octo-Agents lead the charge to restore it.
Three Little Pigs. Children's animated adventures. The Numberblocks present their very own, very numbery version of the classic tale The Three Little Pigs and the Big Bad Square.
Red. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. R loves pretending to be a pirate, so she rustles up a ship and takes her crew on a ride.
Topsy Turvy Day. It's Topsy Turvy Day, and Love Monster is finding it really difficult as everyone has to do things the opposite way to how they usually do them.
Gloves. Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.
Pak Choi. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's your favourite show host Pak Choi, who might be known by many names but sings about how she's Always Pak Choi to You!
Bus Ride. The seaside bus breaks down, but Bing still finds a way to have fun.
Dragon. Dee encourages a friend to say 'dragon', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's a scaly dragon, a dizzy dragon and a dreaming dragon!
A Twig's Tale. Lu accidentally breaks Barnaby's special twig and realises how much it means to him.
Whoosh. Keith is heading to his first music lesson, but a wild air stream blocks his way. The Piggies want to help by building a bridge, but they can't agree on the best material to use.
More About Joining Up. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos learn about joining up by making paperclip chains and putting the fruit tea machine back together.
Back in Time. Justin and his friends step back in time, and Mr Tumble has some clock trouble.
Being Quiet. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. Tinky Winky can't sleep and goes outside to play so as not to wake the other Teletubbies. But his footsteps are noisy and wake them.
Fluffy. Nigel and Baby Bear encourage grown-ups and their babies to explore different things that feel fluffy, through discovery, play, song and a story. Everyone at home can join in too!
Dentist. Elsee visits a dentist and plays I-spy with her new friend Shanaya.
Weeds. Aaron, Joda and Isla are on a new garden adventure, this time looking for plants called weeds, which grow in the most surprising of places.
Underwater Adventure. Is there an alien in the attic or is it just another fabulous transformation? A paper bowl becomes a sea turtle, boxes become boats and a bottle becomes a manta ray.
Fuzzy Eaters. The Broccolisaurus need a haircut. Luckily, their florets are a Pea's favourite snack!
Markets. Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy.
The Soap Opera Badge. After accidentally breaking the Chickens' TV aerial, the Squirrels recreate the final episode of their favourite soap opera.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Hey! Diddle, Diddle. Billy and Sillies perform a little hoedown to the tune of Hey Diddle Diddle.
Swirly Rock and Diggers Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers pretend to be diggers and discover a pointy tower on a walk to buy bread!
Meet Henry's Family. Henry lives with his Mummy, Mama, and sister Sophie. There's lots of fun in store with a breakfast boogie, a farm visit, trampoline tricks, and a ladybird rescue mission!
Orson's English Bakewell Tart. Orson is cooking a special version of bakewell tart. To make things more exciting, he is throwing his friends an afternoon tea party with fancy dress.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Red Squirrels. Rory & Sandy search the forest for shy red squirrels, and Chantelle meets a local expert.
Mission: Birthday Cake. Guide dog Kika and Dr Amit visit the supermarket to pick up a surprise birthday cake. But the party hats have been moved! Kika must use all her powers to find them.
Giraffe and Red Panda. Steve and Aneeshwar meet a ginormous giraffe and a hungry red panda.
Night Night, Waffle. Preschool comedy drama series. The family spend their first night together, but they and their neighbours are kept awake by Waffle's constant barking.
The Fast Day. Oona and Baba try to catch up with a very fast moth.
Imagination (Give It a Try). Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The potatoes discover the amazing things you can do when you give imagination a try.
Fortune Cookies. Yukee's garden pals think the fortune cookie messages she has given them are true.
The Art Badge. The Squirrels learn about different types of art and what inspires them while preparing their own pieces for Tino the Artistic Mouse's Woodland Biennale.
Nose. Dee encourages a friend to say 'nose', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different noses - funny noses, bunny noses, sniffy noses and even snoring noses!
Odd Block Club. The Odd Blocks are meeting for their special club. These Numberblocks have an odd block on top, so where does Numberblock One fit in?
Blue. Educational fun. U is upside-down, next to an upside-down tree, and the whole of Alphaland is blue. How did that happen?
Beach, Boats and Birds. Justin and his friend take a boat trip to spot some wildlife. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble creates a beach in his garden, but things don't entirely go to plan.
Tall Tower. Preschool series. Laa-Laa has fun watching Dipsy stretch up like a tall tower. The Tubby Toaster goes crazy and fires out Tubby Toast which ends up in a tall tower.
Patchwork Squirrel. The Patchwork Pals have a problem. Squirrel is collecting all the nuts but only for himself! Will they find a way to make him share?
Raa Raa's Whistle Worries. Animation featuring Raa Raa, who lives in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa is determined to copy all the noises in the Jingly Jangly Jungle.
Night Moves. When a pipe bursts in the Roundhouse, an exhausted Wilson must roam Chuggington in search of a new cabin to sleep in. But nothing feels quite like home.
Episode 25. Another chance to see the best bits from Gigglebiz.
Ankylosaur and Club. Preschool adventure series. Andy meets the ankylosaur, the armoured tank of the dinosaur world, when he travels 70 million years back in time.
The Singing Caterpillar. The Game Catchers land on the Salad Planet to play hurdles relay.
Octonauts and the Hidden Lake. Animated deep sea adventure series. In Antarctica, Shellington discovers strange microscopic creatures living under the ice.
The Tale of the Runaway Rabbit. Animated series. Peter is left to babysit Cotton-tail but can't resist an exciting event at the squirrel camp. He brings his sleeping sister along.
The Crazy Golf Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels practise their golf in pursuit of a round of milkshakes.
Zigzag's Buddy Worry. Zigzag's buddy doesn't feel like coming out to play, but Vida gets him exercising!
Young Veggies: Part 2. In part 2, Supertato reveals how he learned to control his potato powers, defeat Evil Pea and save the supermarket for the very first time.
Mission Castle. Sir Weasy the naughty knight ruins the castle the ducklings built.
Supersecret Swoptops. It's secret agent time when Mojo and Bo think Didi the tractor is up to something fishy. But can the two supersecret spies follow her without being spotted?
Exercise. Bingo pretends to be Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout!
The Crustacean Vacation. The Piris help a tricky family of touring crabs, but will they be happy with their visit?
Sticky Gecko. The kids are late for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game.
Andy and the Dino Poop. Andy heads out on an epic adventure across Dino Island to collect dinosaur poop samples.
Waffle and Benji. Waffle's been awarded the class toy for good behaviour, and Zoe and Callum have big news.
The Stuck Together Wish. Rafi wishes her play date with Ruby could last forever. Stuck together, they realise that even best friends have differences - and that's what makes them special.
It's Time to Make Up a Story. When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.
Arcade Dance-Off. Animation for preschool children. Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to play a video game.
The Sound Snatcher. Animation about a family of small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. A strange flying creature visits the planet and starts eating up all the music.
Connections. MeMo and BaBa explore different types of connections on Planet BeddyByes.
The Tombliboos' Busy Day. Children's show about a magic garden. The Tombliboos ride on the Pinky Ponk, explore the garden and see interesting things before returning home.
Cat Deeley - The Veg Patch Party. Get ready to 'Party like a Pea' with Cat Deeley. It's 'Veggie Party Time'!
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Dessert Castle. Tish and Bobby are having trouble finishing their vegetables during dinner time, so their parents take away the cake until they are finished.
Plasters. Children's animation. Bing sees Coco with a plaster on her finger and wants one too. Bing makes one out of sticky tape, but it is too sticky.
Cold. Preschool series. The Teletubbies are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies, who are inside and warm. They put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.
New Friends. Tee and Mo meet their new friends Becca and Bryn at the Jungle Gym Play Centre. Unfortunately, Tee and Becca soon discover that they don't like playing the same things.
Undercover Tomato. Tomato paints himself green and goes undercover as a Mini Pea to discover how Evil Pea is firing them at Tato Tower. He makes an unexpected new Mini Pea friend.
Face Paint. Sula paints Bing to look like Biteysaurus, but upsets Bing by accidentally adding purple.
Pigs Might Fly. Apple-picking with Preston's drone goes terribly wrong, and Mojo and Bo are on the chase!
Calm Down. Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand.
The Buddy Badge. Duggee hosts a Buddy Bonanza for Mrs Weaver and the Squirrels, with the aim of finding new buddies with common interests to them.
Relax. Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their hotel room than relax on the beach.
Dad Baby. In a new game, Dad is unprepared for the realities of giving birth to a baby Bingo.
Ronda Reunion, Spain. Xuli and Foz are on a holiday adventure, cracking clues to find Xuli's long-lost friend.
The Tale of Fred Snail. Animated series. Benjamin gets a pet snail, but his friends can't see the appeal, especially when it attracts the attention of Old Brown!
Land of Fire and Ice. The Octonauts race to save a herd of reindeer as a volcanic eruption melts a glacier.
Off We Go. The animated adventures of friends who can always count on each other. Five and friends set off on a rhyming romp through a field and forest, but they keep getting mixed up.
Hen. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. H makes a hen, who lays an egg, which rolls away. The Alphablocks hop to it and give chase.
Shooting Star Night. A group of fireflies accidentally spoil Love Monster's stargazing garden party when their light makes it too bright for everyone to see the stars in the night sky.
Socks. It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!
Runner Beans. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the speedy dancing Runner Beans, who won't stand still for even one minute.
Magnets. Coco shows Bing how magnets work, but then Bing drops the magnet behind the flowerbed!
Pasta. Dee encourages a friend to say 'pasta', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different types of pasta - green , cheesy and even some rainbow pasta.
Play with Me! Biba gets frustrated when Lu abandons their cushion castle to play with baby Bo.
Big Top. Reg asks the Piggies to organise a show for the Bunnies. Not only will they build the stage, they will also be the stars of the show!
More About Going Over. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch an athlete going over some hurdles in a field and decide to try going over them themselves.
Paints and Pottery. Justin and his friend get creative with paint at a pottery cafe. Artiste Tumble also has an arty day, painting a portrait of Tumble Ted.
Music. Preschool series. The Teletubbies become a pop group and perform a song. In Tummy Tales, children watch a one-man band playing music and accompany him by playing their own.
Seaside. Giovanna, Baby Bear and everyone at The Baby Club explore seaside-themed objects and toys through discovery, play, song and a story. Grown-ups and babies at home can join in too!
Camping. Elsee plays I-spy whilst on a camping trip with her new friend Theodore.
Seeds. Aaron, James and Abbie find some baby plants in the garden. They go on an adventure to discover where they come from and how to grow your own.
Attic Clean-up. A clean-up in the attic inspires a multitude of Monster Makes, including a paper banana skin, scrap bag monsters and a terrific box truck. Let's get recycling!
Rainy Day. Stuck in a cave during heavy rain, Ginger and the Peas have fun playing indoors for once.
Blue Mountains. Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains. They outsmart Cheeky Fox to find the softest beds in the world.
The Mythical Creature Badge. The Squirrels find a hidden book about mythical creatures.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Five Little Ducks. Mrs Weaver and the Penguins help reunite Mummy Duck with her babies as they sing Five Little Ducks.
Sleepy Dragon and Anchor Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers meet a sleepy dragon and fly on a spaceship anchor on a walk to sail boats!
Henry: Mummy's Birthday Adventure. It's Mummy's birthday and Henry plans a heroic adventure.
Naima's Algerian Borek. Naima is cooking Algerian borek. Borek is made from pastry, potato, meat, cheese and you can even add olives. She can't wait for her friends to taste it!

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Slugs. Chantelle visits a school nature garden, where she joins the children to search for slugs, while Rory meets an expert on our superslimy friends.
Mission: Sunflower Adventure. The allotments are a big place for a little dog. Can disability assistance dog Tinks find someone to help her and Charli water their sunflower seeds?
Komodo and Chameleon. Steve and Aneeshwar film a huge Komodo dragon and an incredible chameleon.
Goodbye Waffle? Preschool comedy drama series. It's time to say goodbye to the puppy. Evie goes with Jess to her veterinary practice to scan Waffle's microchip.
Baba's Friend. Baba becomes friends with a very special creature.
Chip's Theme. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. Chip sings a heartfelt song about being a potato. Though he can't do many physical things, he is proud of who he is.
Code Crackers. Sonny finds an old musical safe, which only opens with the right musical code. With Yukee's help, Sonny tries every tune he can think of, but none opens the box.
The Mystery Badge. The Squirrels go to a fancy party at King Tiger's house and become embroiled in a mystery when the prized ruby centrepiece disappears from his party crown.
Bird. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bird', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different birds, including a swimming bird, a napping bird and even a rapping bird.
Five Makes a Wish. Five wishes to fly up to the stars, but she doesn't have enough blocks to get there. Can Five figure out what she needs to reach the stars and make a wish?
Outlaw. Educational fun. When Alphablock I starts making up new laws, AU are soon on the run, with AW in hot pursuit!
Animal Antics. Justin and his friend meet some amazing reptiles and make a snake sock puppet. Mr Tumble has his own animal fun when five speckled frogs come to visit.
Inside Outside. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies have lots of fun playing inside and outside Home Dome. They wave to the Tiddlytubbies from inside and outside too.
Patchwork Clam. Patchwork Clam has a problem - she can't play because she is way too shy! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to make her come out of her shell?
Raa Raa Gets Hiccups. Animation featuring Raa Raa, who lives in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa can't get rid of his hiccups. His friends try to help him.
The Great Chugger Caper. The Spy Chuggers are back as the trainees set out on a top secret mission to retrieve a secret surprise gift for Skipper Stu.
Enrico's Duck Dance. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Keith Fitt attempts to break a hook-a-duck world record, and Gail Force hosts a new chat show.
Gigantoraptor and Feather. Preschool adventure series. Andy travels back 85 million years to meet a giant feathered dinosaur that is as tall as a house!
A Few Dinos Too Many! The Game Catchers find themselves on a Beachy Planet and learn to play the game pour and fill. They need to be creative when making more materials for the game!
Octonauts and the Octopod Mystery. Animated deep sea adventure series. When the Octopod breaks down, Tweak and the crew have to search for a missing part.
The Tale of Cotton-Tail's Cake. Animated series. When Cotton-tail's birthday cake is stolen and Peter vows to get it back, he finds himself in hot water with some angry villains!
The Mixtape Badge. The Squirrels make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of their happy memories together.
Sunny's Vet Training. Sunny Mouse joins Vida for a day of vet training, but he's so small that most jobs are too big... until the perfect one presents itself.
Freezy Sprinklers. Evil Pea plots to take over the whole supermarket by making fake freezy sprinklers to fool Supertato. But what is her real plan, and will Supertato stop her?
Mission Swimming Pool. The ducklings blame Weasy for destroying their swimming pool when they wanted to cool off.
Ludwig the Lady. Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!
Relax. Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their hotel room than relax on the beach.
The Emperor's New Feathers. The Emperor Piri needs help when he gets locked out of the lookout without his feathers.
Dad Baby. In a new game, Dad is unprepared for the realities of giving birth to a baby Bingo.
Andy and the Dino Treasure Hunt. Andy embarks on an adventure and meets velociraptors and an Alamosaurus.
Waffle's Homework. Waffle's forgotten to do his homework, and Mr Nolan decides if he can continue as a pupil.
The Do It All Wish. Rafi's wish to be in two places at once leads to mix-ups. She realises it's better to focus on one thing at a time.
It's Time to Grow a Flower. JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but discovers that it will take a long time to bloom.
Mars as Moon. Animation for preschool children. Mars tries to fill in for a missing moon but needs a little coaching from Sarah and Duck.
Woolly Welcome. Animation about a family of small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. The Hoot Planet visits the Clangers, and wool starts raining down from the sky.
Breathe. MeMo and BaBa discover how their breath changes as they pant after a race, when it's cold, for music and when they sleep.
The Pontipines on the Ninky Nonk. Children's programme. Everyone goes for a ride on the Ninky Nonk but the Pontipines are left behind, so they chase after it all around the garden.
02/04/2026. A different story read each night just before bedtime.
